noSessionFinish.name: DeepWorkBridgeError
noSessionFinish.message: No active workflow session. The finished_step tool reports completion of a step within a running workflow. If you want to resume a workflow, just start it again and call finished_step with quality_review_override_reason until you get back to your prior step.

unknownOutput.name: DeepWorkBridgeError
unknownOutput.message: Unknown output names: bogus. Declared outputs: draft

forwardGoTo.name: DeepWorkBridgeError
forwardGoTo.message: Cannot go forward to step 'finalize' (index 1 > current 0). Use finished_step to advance forward.
